calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Leave To Amend Existing Judgment To Refelect The True Name Of Deft
Off Calendar Mar-16-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on plaintiff's motion for leave to amend the Judgment issued April 22, 2008.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Burke W. Bradley, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Lee Bok Wang, who was placed under oath but did not testify.
No appearance by defendant Evelyn Kim, a/k/a Hyang Hui Kim.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, plaintiff's motion to amend the Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc is GRANGED.

Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-08-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-22-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Burke W. Bradley, Esq. appeared with Lee Bok Wang, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Evelyn Kim.
Default entered against defendant on January 28, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed today, April 22, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Lee Bok Wang, and against the Defaulted Defendant: Evelyn Kim as follows:

Damages/Principal - $23,000.00.
Costs $360.00, for a total of $23,360.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2008 Continued To May-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
